calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Continued To Jul-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rafael Crespo Jr. Esq. 415-285-2063 Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Jianlin Song, Esq. 415-625-9259 Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker for Defendant SIMON MED IMAGING.
Matthew Michelson, Esq. 415-408-8493 Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendant Brian Trinh.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
The Court hears Simon Med Imaging's Demurrer and Motion to Strike simultaneously.
Ms. Song contests and presents arguments; Counsel contests the overruling of its demurrer as to the Plaintiff's Sixth COA (Unruh Civil Rights Act); requests to reconsider distinction of sex.
Mr. Crespo responds to arguments.
Court comments and poses questions; what is discrimination in Unruh Civil Rights act.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - Defendant Simon Med Imaging's Demurrer to Complaint is Taken Under Submission.

A proposed order was submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rafael Crespo Jr. Esq. 415-285-2063 Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Jianlin Song, Esq. 415-625-9259 Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker for Defendant SIMON MED IMAGING.
Matthew Michelson, Esq. 415-408-8493 Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendant Brian Trinh.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
The Court hears Simon Med Imaging's Demurrer and Motion to Strike simultaneously.
Ms. Song contests and presents arguments; Counsel contests the overruling of its demurrer as to the Plaintiff's Sixth COA (Unruh Civil Rights Act); requests to reconsider distinction of sex.
Mr. Crespo responds to arguments.
Court comments and poses questions; what is discrimination in Unruh Civil Rights act.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

2 - Defendant Simon Med Imaging's Motion to Strike is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rafael Crespo Jr. Esq. 415-285-2063 Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Jianlin Song, Esq. 415-625-9259 Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker for Defendant SIMON MED IMAGING.
Matthew Michelson, Esq. 415-408-8493 Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendant Brian Trinh.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Mr. Michelson presents arguments; contests only 6th COA, adopts all arguments of Ms. Song; argues business establishment issue on the TR.
Court comments and poses questions.
Mr. Crespo responds.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

3 - Defendant Brian Trinh's Demurrer to Complaint is Taken Under Submission.

A proposed order was submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
